name: global-tax-governance
description: Tax governance skill library for senior practitioners — Pillar Two, transfer pricing, TCF, DAC, CbCR, audit defense, AI Act in the tax function. Thirteen skills with six transversal critics (reviewer note · citation exactness · currency watch · decision tree · finding state · cross-matter leak). Jurisdiction-agnostic profile customizable through a cold-start interview; Spain ships as the seed profile.
